metadata.definition_answer: AEC project management refers to the discipline of planning, coordinating, and controlling projects within the architecture, engineering, and construction industries. It involves balancing scope, schedule, budget, and team dynamics to ensure successful delivery of complex infrastructure projects.
metadata.episode_intro: AEC project management careers are at the heart of this milestone podcast episode celebrating 100 insightful discussions. This episode revisits key lessons and practical strategies from the architecture, engineering, and construction sector. Listeners gain valuable takeaways to enhance leadership, communication, and project delivery performance.
metadata.episode_summary: This milestone episode reflects on 100 episodes of AEC project management, highlighting leading insights in leadership, communication, and project delivery methods. It offers listeners a curated recap of essential strategies for success in the architecture, engineering, and construction industries.
metadata.qa_items_0_question: What are essential skills for aec project management careers?
metadata.qa_items_0_answer: Essential skills for AEC project management careers include effective communication, leadership, time management, and cross-disciplinary coordination. Mastery of project scope, schedule, and budget control is critical for success.
metadata.qa_items_1_question: How can project managers advance in the aec sector?
metadata.qa_items_1_answer: Advancement in the AEC sector requires continuous learning, networking, and adapting to emerging technologies and industry best practices. Building trust and emotional intelligence also supports leadership growth.
metadata.qa_items_2_question: What role does leadership play in aec project management careers?
metadata.qa_items_2_answer: Leadership in AEC project management careers involves guiding teams through complex challenges, fostering collaboration, and managing risks effectively. Successful leaders balance technical knowledge with emotional intelligence.
metadata.qa_items_3_question: What strategies improve communication in aec projects?
metadata.qa_items_3_answer: Improving communication in AEC projects includes setting clear expectations, utilizing collaborative technologies, and fostering open dialogue. Transparency and active listening enhance stakeholder alignment.
metadata.qa_items_4_question: How do technological tools impact project delivery?
metadata.qa_items_4_answer: Technological tools streamline workflows, improve accuracy in design and scheduling, and facilitate real-time collaboration. They support more efficient management of project scope, budget, and timeline.
metadata.qa_items_5_question: What are common challenges in managing aec projects?
metadata.qa_items_5_answer: Common challenges include scope creep, budget overruns, schedule delays, and coordination among diverse stakeholders. Effective risk management and proactive leadership mitigate these issues.
metadata.qa_items_6_question: How important is emotional intelligence in aec project management?
metadata.qa_items_6_answer: Emotional intelligence is crucial for building trust, resolving conflicts, and motivating teams within AEC project environments. It supports stronger relationships and improved project outcomes.
metadata.qa_items_7_question: What best practices support successful aec project delivery?
metadata.qa_items_7_answer: Best practices include comprehensive planning, consistent monitoring of scope and schedule, stakeholder engagement, and adaptive leadership. Integrating lessons learned also drives continuous improvement.
metadata.qa_items_8_question: How can new project managers thrive in aec industries?
metadata.qa_items_8_answer: New project managers can thrive by seeking mentorship, gaining practical experience, and learning to balance technical and interpersonal skills. Staying organized and proactive enables them to meet project demands effectively.

metadata.aeo_intro_html: Episode AECPM 100: AEC project management careers are at the heart of this milestone podcast episode celebrating 100 insightful discussions. This episode revisits key lessons and practical strategies from the architecture, engineering, and construction sector. Listeners gain valuable takeaways to enhance leadership, communication, and project delivery performance.
metadata.aeo_definition_html:
What is AEC Project Management?

AEC project management refers to the discipline of planning, coordinating, and controlling projects within the architecture, engineering, and construction industries. It involves balancing scope, schedule, budget, and team dynamics to ensure successful delivery of complex infrastructure projects.
metadata.aeo_qa_html:
What are the essential skills for AEC project management careers?

Essential skills for AEC project management careers include effective communication, leadership, time management, and cross-disciplinary coordination. Mastery of project scope, schedule, and budget control is critical for success.
  • Strong interpersonal and leadership abilities
  • Proficiency in scheduling and budgeting
  • Ability to manage interdisciplinary teams

How can project managers advance in the AEC sector?

Advancement in the AEC sector requires continuous learning, networking, and adapting to emerging technologies and industry best practices. Building trust and emotional intelligence also supports leadership growth.
  • Engage in ongoing professional development
  • Leverage emerging project delivery technologies
  • Cultivate emotional intelligence and team trust

What role does leadership play in AEC project management careers?

Leadership in AEC project management careers involves guiding teams through complex challenges, fostering collaboration, and managing risks effectively. Successful leaders balance technical knowledge with emotional intelligence.
  • Facilitating team collaboration
  • Risk identification and mitigation
  • Balancing technical and interpersonal skills

What strategies improve communication in AEC projects?

Improving communication in AEC projects includes setting clear expectations, utilizing collaborative technologies, and fostering open dialogue. Transparency and active listening enhance stakeholder alignment.
  • Clarify roles and responsibilities early
  • Use digital collaboration tools
  • Encourage feedback and active listening

How do technological tools impact project delivery?

Technological tools streamline workflows, improve accuracy in design and scheduling, and facilitate real-time collaboration. They support more efficient management of project scope, budget, and timeline.
  • Automate routine tasks and reporting
  • Enhance design and modeling accuracy
  • Enable real-time team communication

What are common challenges in managing AEC projects?

Common challenges include scope creep, budget overruns, schedule delays, and coordination among diverse stakeholders. Effective risk management and proactive leadership mitigate these issues.
  • Managing project scope changes
  • Controlling costs and timelines
  • Navigating stakeholder complexities

How important is emotional intelligence in AEC project management?

Emotional intelligence is crucial for building trust, resolving conflicts, and motivating teams within AEC project environments. It supports stronger relationships and improved project outcomes.
  • Enhances communication and empathy
  • Improves conflict resolution
  • Boosts team morale and collaboration

What best practices support successful AEC project delivery?

Best practices include comprehensive planning, consistent monitoring of scope and schedule, stakeholder engagement, and adaptive leadership. Integrating lessons learned also drives continuous improvement.
  • Develop detailed project plans
  • Maintain transparent progress tracking
  • Engage all project stakeholders

How can new project managers thrive in the AEC industries?

New project managers can thrive by seeking mentorship, gaining practical experience, and learning to balance technical and interpersonal skills. Staying organized and proactive enables them to meet project demands effectively.
  • Pursue guidance from experienced leaders
  • Build strong organizational habits
  • Focus on communication alongside technical skills

Top AEC Project Management Podcast Episodes

In this milestone episode, we’re looking back at the top 10 episodes that captured your attention the most — the conversations that resonated, sparked new ways of thinking, and delivered practical takeaways you could apply immediately.
  1. The Project Management Triangle: Scope, Schedule, and Budget – Ep 001, Mike Lozanoff, P.E., Owner of Lozanoff Consulting Services, LLC
  2. Proactive Leadership in Project Management: Key Principles & Best Practices – Ep 080, John Boulé, PE, Executive Vice President and Operating Unit Manager, Northeast, Dewberry
  3. How AI is Transforming Construction Project Technology – Ep 089, Ryan Kunish, Vice President of Global Product at Oracle Construction and Engineering
  4. Leadership in Geotechnical Engineering Firms That Drive Project Success – Ep 085, Rodney Jones, RCE, GE, Principal Engineer and CEO of Skyline Geotechnical Inc.
  5. How Intelligent Transportation Systems Improve Road Safety and Efficiency – Ep 091, Clarke Chauvin, PE, PTOE, PMP, Senior Project Manager and Licensed Professional Engineer at Neal Schaffer
  6. Delivering Large Scale Infrastructure Projects with Confidence – Ep 076, Rohit Motwani, CCM, PMP, Program Initiation Lead, Americas East at Jacobs
  7. Practical Strategies That Will Make You a Better Project Manager – Ep 060, Laura Barnard, PMP, CAL, Prosci, IES, Founder and Chief IMPACT Driver of PMO Strategies
  8. Project Management Tips for Engineers: How to Become a Well-Rounded Project Manager – Ep 003, Gary Hamilton, P.E., CEng, PMP, LEED AP, CxA, EDAC, FASHE, Senior Vice President, and USA Healthcare Director at WSP in the U.S.
  9. Mastering Technical Leadership in AEC Projects for Better Collaboration and Delivery – Ep 081, Jose Matteo, MBA, MSEE, Senior Project Manager
  10. The Power of Empathetic Project Leadership in AEC – Ep 083, Sebastian Lobo-Guerrero, Ph.D., P.E., BC.GE., Technical Project Manager and Laboratory Manager at American Geotechnical & Environmental Services Inc.

metadata.aeo_speakers_html:
Meet the Speakers

Your Host

Fiona Johann, PMP, AEC PM

Fiona Johann, PMP, joined The Engineering Management Institute as the strategic initiatives team leader in February 2025. With eight years of experience in developing leadership programs in an academic setting, she brings valuable expertise in planning and executing impactful initiatives. Fiona utilizes her PMP certification and program management skills to oversee events like PM AEC Connect and optimize internal processes for improved efficiency. Based in central North Carolina, she combines her strategic approach with a passion for driving successful outcomes at EMI.
